name: Kindergarten Living Library — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

units.title: Wonder and notice: finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries through a close look at finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries.

activities.title: A close look at finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in finding information, diverse voices, and sharing discoveries.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
